title: cyperus eragrostis
intro: Cyperus eragrostis, also known as tiger sedge or purple papyrus, is a type of aquatic sedge plant native to tropical regions of Africa, Asia, and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus eragrostis include reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
